member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Jellyfin2HQPlayer.Configuration.PluginConfiguration.#ctor
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.

member.name: T:Jellyfin.Plugin.Jellyfin2HQPlayer.EntryPoint.LibraryItemEventLoggerService
member.summary: 监听 Jellyfin 媒体库变更事件（ItemAdded / ItemRemoved） 并通过防抖调度触发 PathIndex 重建

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Jellyfin2HQPlayer.EntryPoint.LibraryItemEventLoggerService.OnItemAdded(System.Object,MediaBrowser.Controller.Library.ItemChangeEventArgs)
member.summary: 任意类型 Item 被添加（Audio / Album / Artist / Folder 等） 不做类型过滤，统一进入防抖调度

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Jellyfin2HQPlayer.EntryPoint.LibraryItemEventLoggerService.OnItemRemoved(System.Object,MediaBrowser.Controller.Library.ItemChangeEventArgs)
member.summary: 任意类型 Item 被删除

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Jellyfin2HQPlayer.EntryPoint.LibraryItemEventLoggerService.ScheduleDebounce(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: 防抖调度： 1. 取消之前的任务 2. 延时执行 rebuild 3. 保证同一时间只有一个 rebuild 在运行

member.name: M:Jellyfin.Plugin.Jellyfin2HQPlayer.Plugin.#ctor(MediaBrowser.Common.Configuration.IApplicationPaths,MediaBrowser.Model.Serialization.IXmlSerializer)
member.summary: Initializes a new instance of the class.
